meaning: 拉马拉(巴勒斯坦地区的城市,在约旦河西岸)
examples: Mourid Barghouti evokes them all in his memoir, "I Was Born There, I Was Born here", which continues the story begun in his 2003 work, "I Saw Ramallah".
The petrol pumped into Gaza by underground pipes and hoses from Egypt costs a third of what it does in Ramallah, the Palestinians' West Bank capital, where Israel supplies it.
Next door, in the West Bank, some Palestinians are living the high life in Ramallah.
Sir Vincent had gone to the university near Ramallah to meet students and give a lecture.
Turmus Aya is just 10 miles from the Palestinians financial and political capital Ramallah.
